notes: Batch 1: Most Thai news sites had older content (>24h). Blognone was the strongest Thai source with 4 quality articles.
Batch 2: OpenAI Daybreak cybersecurity platform was dominant story. Export control on Anthropic models is major geopolitical development.
Batch 3: YouTube channels could not be confirmed within 24h window (no browser access). ArXiv provided 5 high-quality agentic AI papers.
v2.0 batch mode: 3 batch JSON files instead of 30+ individual files. Backward-compat individual article files also written.
